creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch below fixes this build problem on FreeBSD 11:
http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/head-i386-default/2013-10-31_19h34m41s/logs/errors/net-snmp-5.7.2_3.log

It adds a new patch to the port that fixes some defines in freebsd9.h
and freebsd10.h and adds freebsd11.h.
